content: NexusMods.App (official, .NET/Avalonia) uses SQLite for persistence with an event-sourcing 'DataModel' enabling Undo. Deployment installs mod files into the game folder via hardlinks (falls back to copy); it is reversible/non-destructive via Disk State Storage. Has explicit 'Wine and Proton Detection Design' decision record. Linux community managers (Amethyst, Limo, TMM-Tauri) all stage mods MO2-style and deploy via hardlink/symlink; ~100k files deploy in ~0.5s after resolve optimization.
